text: Hello? Hello? Hey, good evening, my name is Alyssa. I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Florida State Relief Program. So far, have you received any updates or notifications about this yet? No. I'm not all we know is here for Medicare. Sorry, but you don't seem to qualify for the plans that we have. Have a great day.
